title: Home Screen - Charger case pop up appears after 1st, 3rd, 5th, 10th 15th... app launch
scenario: Charging case firmware update pop-up appears repeatedly on app home screen on subsequent launches instead of only once after initial connection
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has an outdated charging case firmware.
3. Observe the Home screen for a charging case firmware update pop-up dialog.
4. Dismiss the pop-up dialog (e.g., tap 'Later' or close).
5. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely (swipe from recent apps).
6. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the Home screen again for the charging case firmware update pop-up.
8. Repeat steps 5–7 multiple times (e.g., on the 1st, 3rd, 5th, 10th, 15th launch).
expected: The charging case firmware update pop-up should appear only once after the initial connection and should not reappear on subsequent app restarts.
